untranslatable_reason: Point-and-figure trading requires dynamic box_size and price_level parameters which are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. The exact calculation method for box sizing and the specific lookback period for 'new highs/lows' determination cannot be derived from source text. Additionally, true P&F charts require column-based logic (alternating X and O columns) which is not expressible in this rule engine's condition-based framework.
translation_notes: Attempted literal interpretation: new highs = close > previous high, new lows = close < previous low. However, this does not capture the essential P&F mechanics of box sizing relative to price level and volatility. The signal requires author to specify box_size parameter and the reference period for detecting new highs/lows, both marked AUTHOR_SILENT.
